zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alan Pennington於1233年3月27日出生在英國波藍德蒙卡斯特時，他的父親Sir Thomas Pennington33歲，母親Agnes Longvillers Greystoke14歲。他和Lucretia de Radcliffe至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1277年9月20日在英國藍卡爾維享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Alan Pennington于1233年3月27日出生在英国波藍德蒙卡斯特时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Pennington33岁，母亲Agnes Longvillers Greystoke14岁。他和Lucretia de Radcliffe至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1277年9月20日在英国藍卡爾維享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pennington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Pennington in Furness (Lancashire), which derives from Old English pening ‘penny’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, or from Pennington in Leigh (Lancashire), which probably derives from the Old English personal name Pinna + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) + Old English tūn.
habitational name from Pennington (Hampshire), or from Penton Grafton or Penton Mewsey (both Hampshire); see   Penton  . All have the same etymology as Pennington in Furness; see 1 above.

variants.name: Penington
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Pennington  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.
History: Edward Penington, born in 1667 in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, was appointed surveyor-general of the province of PA in 1698 and accompanied William Penn to Philadelphia.

variants.name: Penton
meanings: habitational name from Penton Grafton or Penton Mewsey (both Hanmpshire), or from a shortened form of Pennington 2. The placenames denoted a farm or estate for which a penny tax was payable (Old English pening ‘penny’ + tūn).
in north-west England, a shortened form of   Pennington   1, from either of the places called Pennington in Lancashire.

nameMeanings.name: Alan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alan Pennington was born on 27 March 1233, in Muncaster, Cumberland, England, his father, Sir Thomas Pennington, was 33 and his mother, Agnes Longvillers Greystoke, was 14. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Lucretia de Radcliffe. He died on 20 September 1277, in Wyre, Lancashire, England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alan Pennington est né le 27 mars 1233, à Muncaster, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Pennington, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Agnes Longvillers Greystoke, avait 14 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Lucretia de Radcliffe. Il est décédé le 20 septembre 1277, à Wyre, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Alan Pennington am 27. März 1233 in Muncaster, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Pennington 33 und seine Mutter Agnes Longvillers Greystoke 14. Er hatte mit Lucretia de Radcliffe mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. September 1277 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Wyre, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alan Pennington è nato il il 27 marzo 1233 nel Muncaster, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Pennington, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Longvillers Greystoke, aveva 14 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Lucretia de Radcliffe. Morì il 20 settembre 1277, nel Wyre, Lancashire, England, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alan Penningtonが1233年3月27日にイギリスクウンバーランドムンカスターで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Penningtonは33歳，母Agnes Longvillers Greystokeは14歳であった。彼はLucretia de Radcliffeとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1277年9月20日にイギリスランカシュアイアウイアで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alan Pennington(이)가 1233년 3월 27일 영국 쿠벌랜드 먼카스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Pennington(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Longvillers Greystoke(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Lucretia de Radcliffe(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1277년 9월 20일 영국 랭카실르 윈이르에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.27 March 1233–20 September 1277: 1233 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 27–1277 оны Есдүгээр сарын 20

pt.27 March 1233–20 September 1277: 27 de março de 1233–20 de setembro de 1277
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alan Pennington nasceu em 27 de março de 1233, em Muncaster, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Pennington, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Longvillers Greystoke, tinha 14 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Lucretia de Radcliffe. Ele faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1277, em Wyre, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Alan Pennington родился 27 марта 1233 г. в местности мункастир, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Pennington было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Longvillers Greystoke, 14. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Lucretia de Radcliffe. Он умер 20 сентября 1277 г. в местности вир, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.27 March 1233–20 September 1277: 27 de marzo de 1233–20 de septiembre de 1277
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Alan Pennington nació el 27 de marzo de 1233, en Muncaster, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Pennington, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Agnes Longvillers Greystoke, tenía 14 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Lucretia de Radcliffe. Murió el 20 de septiembre de 1277, en Wyre, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años.
